notes: Batch 9 is high-quality MileDown MCAT cloze content; 239/257 cards are clean with balanced cloze/LaTeX/HTML markup and correct question/answer correspondence, and no markup-balance or empty-answer errors were found. The dominant issue (16 cards, all in the Physics/Math scientific-notation, REDOX-balancing, and electrochemistry-equation sections) is image-only cloze answers where the deleted answer is rendered as an image and therefore absent from the extracted answer_text; these study correctly in-app and are recorded at info severity. The only non-image defects are one truncated sentence ('...after eating a meal while', warning) and one spacing artifact ('a rachidonic', info).
